what: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: Access carbon market data R. Emissions trading system prices verified emissions, voluntary carbon credit registrations retirements, global carbon pricing data compliance voluntary markets worldwide.

what: Carbon markets now price 12 billion tonnes a year. The data is a mess.
title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: Carbon pricing gone niche instrument systemic part global climate policy. Around 12 billion tonnes CO2-equivalent now covered form carbon price, 24% global emissions. EU ETS alone prices ~40% EU emissions generates roughly EUR 40 billion year auction revenue. Voluntary carbon markets issued 2 billion credits since 1996, Article 6 Paris Agreement bringing new wave international carbon trading online. catch data scattered across dozens jurisdictions, agencies, registries, format, access pattern, quirks: EU ETS publishes verified emissions allocations via DG CLIMA Union Registry XLSX files year-specific UUIDs, auction prices via EEX per-year XLSX reports UK Emissions Trading Registry publishes compliance allocation reports XLSX, date-stamped filenames change every republication RGGI publishes per-state allowance distributions XLSX stable year-parameterised URL, clearing prices per-auction PDFs California Air Resources Board serves auction prices caps stable CSVs ww2.arb.ca.gov ICAP Allowance Price Explorer exposes cross-ETS prices via undocumented stable JSON endpoint World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard publishes XLSX twice year, filename encodes release date RFF World Carbon Pricing Database lives GitHub per-country CSVs version-stamped folders Berkeley VROD aggregates five voluntary registries bimonthly XLSX release CarbonPlan OffsetsDB maintains daily parquet snapshots voluntary credits public S3 bucket (REST API deprecated 2026) carbondata wraps stable, free, API-accessible sources consistent R interface, handling URL resolution, caching, schema normalisation can get analysis.

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
code: install.packages("carbondata")  # Or install the development version from GitHub # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("charlescoverdale/carbondata")

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: sources free. None require registration v0.1.0 functionality.

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
code: library(carbondata)  # All supported markets at a glance co2_markets()  # Latest EU ETS auction prices prices <- co2_euets_price(from = "2024-01-01") head(prices)  # Verified emissions for large German installations, 2022 emissions <- co2_euets_emissions(country = "DE", year = 2022)  # Cross-market price comparison icap <- co2_icap_prices(jurisdiction = c("EU ETS", "UK ETS", "RGGI"))  # Voluntary forestry projects registered with Verra verra_forestry <- co2_vrod(registry = "Verra", project_type = "Forestry")

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: One chart, four compliance markets, 20 years data.
code: library(carbondata)  icap <- co2_icap_prices(   jurisdiction = c("EU ETS", "UK ETS", "RGGI", "California"),   from = "2005-01-01" )  plot(icap$date, icap$price_usd, col = factor(icap$jurisdiction),      xlab = "", ylab = "USD / tCO2e", pch = 20) legend("topleft", legend = levels(factor(icap$jurisdiction)),        col = seq_len(nlevels(factor(icap$jurisdiction))), pch = 20)

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: Compliance markets (EU ETS) trade around USD 70/tCO2. Nature-based voluntary credits trade around USD 5/tCO2. gap?
code: # EU ETS average 2024 price eu <- co2_euets_price(from = "2024-01-01", to = "2024-12-31") mean(eu$price_eur, na.rm = TRUE) #> [1] ~65  # Average Verra credit issuance across forestry projects vrod <- co2_vrod(registry = "Verra", project_type = "Forestry") summary(vrod$total_issuances)

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: Downloads cached tools::R_user_dir("carbondata", "cache") default. Subsequent calls instant. Override location options(carbondata.cache_dir = "/path//dir"). Use co2_clear_cache() remove cached files.

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: Report bugs request features GitHub Issues.

title: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries
text: carbon markets, emissions trading, EU ETS, UK ETS, RGGI, California Cap--Trade, Verra, Gold Standard, ICAP, World Bank carbon pricing, voluntary carbon markets, climate finance, CO2, greenhouse gas, sustainability disclosure, TCFD, CSRD, SFDR, ISSB

what: carbondata: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries — carbondata-package
title: carbondata: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries — carbondata-package
text: Unified access carbon market data compliance emissions trading systems ('EU ETS', 'UK ETS', 'RGGI', California Cap--Trade) voluntary carbon markets (Verra, Gold Standard, American Carbon Registry, Climate Action Reserve, via Berkeley Voluntary Registry Offsets Database 'CarbonPlan' 'OffsetsDB' API). Includes cross-market price data 'International Carbon Action Partnership' ('ICAP') Allowance Price Explorer https://icapcarbonaction.com/en/ets-prices, global carbon pricing World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard https://carbonpricingdashboard.worldbank.org/, historical 'RFF' World Carbon Pricing Database following Dolphin, Pollitt Newbery (2020) doi:10.1038/s41597-022-01659-x . Data downloaded public sources first use cached locally.

title: carbondata: Access Carbon Market Data from Emissions Trading Systems and Voluntary Registries — carbondata-package
text: Maintainer: Charles Coverdale charlesfcoverdale@gmail.com

what: Inspect the local carbondata cache — co2_cache_info

title: Inspect the local carbondata cache — co2_cache_info

title: Inspect the local carbondata cache — co2_cache_info
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(carbondata.cache_dir = tempdir()) co2_cache_info() #> $dir #> [1] "/tmp/RtmpeUDPoP" #>  #> $n_files #> [1] 2 #>  #> $size_bytes #> [1] 8192 #>  #> $size_human #> [1] "8.0 KB" #>  #> $files #>                                     name size_bytes            modified #> 1 bslib-246362e7e3ff6191071d5f9b40ba8d62       4096 2026-04-24 08:17:40 #> 2                                downlit       4096 2026-04-24 08:17:42 #>  options(op) # }

what: EU ETS free allowance allocations — co2_euets_allocations
title: EU ETS free allowance allocations — co2_euets_allocations
text: Returns free allowance allocations per installation per year. source file co2_euets_emissions().

title: EU ETS free allowance allocations — co2_euets_allocations
code: co2_euets_allocations(   country = NULL,   year = NULL,   file_year = NULL,   refresh = FALSE )

title: EU ETS free allowance allocations — co2_euets_allocations
text: country Optional character vector two-letter registry codes filter (e.g. c("DE", "FR", "PL")). year Optional integer vector emissions years. NULL, returns years latest published file. Note file year (e.g. "2025") refers publication year; emissions data covers calendar years publication year -1. file_year Publication year DG CLIMA file use. Default latest year available package (see co2_euets_files()). refresh Logical. Re-download? Default FALSE.

title: EU ETS free allowance allocations — co2_euets_allocations
text: data frame country, installation_id, year, allocation_eua.

title: EU ETS free allowance allocations — co2_euets_allocations
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # DG CLIMA file schema drifted in 2026; parser needs updating. # Tracked at https://github.com/charlescoverdale/carbondata/issues alloc <- co2_euets_allocations(country = "DE") } # }

title: EU ETS verified emissions — co2_euets_emissions
text: Fetches annual verified greenhouse-gas emissions installations covered EU Emissions Trading System, DG CLIMA Union Registry bulk download. Coverage: ~10,000 stationary installations plus ~1,500 aircraft operators across EU, EEA, linked Swiss ETS. Emissions data 2005 onwards; annual files published April prior compliance year.

title: EU ETS verified emissions — co2_euets_emissions
code: co2_euets_emissions(   country = NULL,   year = NULL,   file_year = NULL,   refresh = FALSE )

title: EU ETS verified emissions — co2_euets_emissions
text: country Optional character vector two-letter registry codes filter (e.g. c("DE", "FR", "PL")). year Optional integer vector emissions years. NULL, returns years latest published file. Note file year (e.g. "2025") refers publication year; emissions data covers calendar years publication year -1. file_year Publication year DG CLIMA file use. Default latest year available package (see co2_euets_files()). refresh Logical. Re-download? Default FALSE.

title: EU ETS verified emissions — co2_euets_emissions
text: data frame columns country, installation_id, installation_name, activity, year, verified_emissions_tco2e, allocation_eua.

title: EU ETS verified emissions — co2_euets_emissions
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # DG CLIMA file schema drifted in 2026; parser needs updating. # Tracked at https://github.com/charlescoverdale/carbondata/issues de <- co2_euets_emissions(country = "DE") } # }

code: co2_euets_price(from = NULL, to = NULL, year = NULL, refresh = FALSE)

what: EU ETS compliance status and cumulative surrendered units — co2_euets_surrendered
title: EU ETS compliance status and cumulative surrendered units — co2_euets_surrendered
text: Returns cumulative total surrendered allowances per installation, compliance code, account closure date. Per-year surrender events require EUTL transaction log ZIP, deferred v0.2.0 ~1.5 GB uncompressed requires LZMA extraction.

title: EU ETS compliance status and cumulative surrendered units — co2_euets_surrendered
code: co2_euets_surrendered(country = NULL, file_year = NULL, refresh = FALSE)

title: EU ETS compliance status and cumulative surrendered units — co2_euets_surrendered
text: country Optional two-letter registry codes. file_year Publication year compliance file. Default latest package. refresh Re-download? Default FALSE.

title: EU ETS compliance status and cumulative surrendered units — co2_euets_surrendered
text: data frame country, installation_id, installation_name, compliance_code, compliance_status, total_verified_emissions, total_surrendered_allowances, year_of_first_emissions, year_of_last_emissions, account_closure.

title: EU ETS compliance status and cumulative surrendered units — co2_euets_surrendered
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(carbondata.cache_dir = tempdir()) comp <- co2_euets_surrendered(country = "FR") #> ℹ Downloading DG CLIMA compliance file for 2024... options(op) # }

text: Fetches allowance prices across 20+ Emissions Trading Systems International Carbon Action Partnership (ICAP) Allowance Price Explorer. Covers EU ETS, UK ETS, California, RGGI, New Zealand, Korea, jurisdictions auction secondary-market prices available.

title: CarbonPlan OffsetsDB (via S3 parquet) — co2_offsets_db
text: Fetches CarbonPlan OffsetsDB daily snapshots voluntary carbon market projects credits, stored Parquet public S3 bucket. Covers Verra, ART TREES, Gold Standard, American Carbon Registry, Climate Action Reserve.

title: CarbonPlan OffsetsDB (via S3 parquet) — co2_offsets_db
code: co2_offsets_db(kind = c("projects", "credits"), date = NULL, refresh = FALSE)

title: CarbonPlan OffsetsDB (via S3 parquet) — co2_offsets_db
text: kind Character. "projects" (default) "credits". date Optional character. ISO date snapshot fetch (must day CarbonPlan published; function walks backwards date 7 days). Default Sys.Date(). refresh Re-download? Default FALSE.

title: CarbonPlan OffsetsDB (via S3 parquet) — co2_offsets_db
text: file path downloaded Parquet file. caller must arrow nanoparquet installed read .

title: CarbonPlan OffsetsDB (via S3 parquet) — co2_offsets_db
text: CarbonPlan REST API offsets-db-api.carbonplan.org deprecated; function uses S3 bucket directly. Parquet reading requires installed Parquet reader; arrow package recommended suggest.

title: CarbonPlan OffsetsDB (via S3 parquet) — co2_offsets_db
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(carbondata.cache_dir = tempdir()) path <- co2_offsets_db("projects") #> ℹ Downloading OffsetsDB projects snapshot from 2026-04-24... if (requireNamespace("arrow", quietly = TRUE)) {   df <- arrow::read_parquet(path) } options(op) # }

what: RFF World Carbon Pricing Database — co2_rff_pricing
title: RFF World Carbon Pricing Database — co2_rff_pricing
text: Fetches Dolphin-Pollitt-Newbery World Carbon Pricing Database one country. Covers national-level carbon pricing 1989 present, CO2 tax ETS instruments harmonised across 200+ jurisdictions.

title: RFF World Carbon Pricing Database — co2_rff_pricing
code: co2_rff_pricing(country, version = "v2026.1", refresh = FALSE)

title: RFF World Carbon Pricing Database — co2_rff_pricing
text: country Character. Country name using underscores (e.g. "United_Kingdom", "Germany", "Antigua_and_Barbuda"). version Character. Dataset version folder. Default "v2026.1". refresh Re-download? Default FALSE.

title: RFF World Carbon Pricing Database — co2_rff_pricing
text: data frame annual carbon prices IPCC sector code.

title: RFF World Carbon Pricing Database — co2_rff_pricing
text: Dolphin, G. G., Pollitt, M. G. Newbery, D. M. (2020). "political economy carbon pricing: panel analysis." Oxford Economic Papers, 72(2), 472–500. doi:10.1093/oep/gpz042

title: RFF World Carbon Pricing Database — co2_rff_pricing
code: # \donttest{ op <- options(carbondata.cache_dir = tempdir()) uk <- co2_rff_pricing("United_Kingdom") #> ℹ Downloading RFF World Carbon Pricing Database for United_Kingdom... options(op) # }

text: data frame allowance distribution state.

title: RGGI allowance distribution by state and year — co2_rggi_allowances
text: Auction clearing prices returned RGGI publishes per-auction PDFs (CSV aggregation exists). RGGI prices, use co2_icap_prices() jurisdiction = "Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative".

what: RGGI cumulative state proceeds by auction — co2_rggi_state_proceeds
title: RGGI cumulative state proceeds by auction — co2_rggi_state_proceeds
text: Fetches cumulative auction proceeds time series one RGGI state, indexed auction number. Derived per-state XLSX files rggi.org. Combining states gives full RGGI auction time series.

title: RGGI cumulative state proceeds by auction — co2_rggi_state_proceeds
text: state Two-letter state code (one : CT, DE, MA, MD, , NH, NJ, NY, RI, VA, VT). refresh Re-download? Default FALSE.

what: UK ETS verified emissions and surrenders — co2_ukets
title: UK ETS verified emissions and surrenders — co2_ukets
text: Fetches UK Emissions Trading Scheme Section 4 compliance report (verified emissions allowance surrenders per account per scheme year), published annually UK Emissions Trading Registry 30 April reconciliation deadline.

title: UK ETS free allocations — co2_ukets_allocations
text: Fetches UK ETS free-allocation table stationary installations (OHA) published DESNZ GOV.UK. Filename includes media GUID changes DESNZ republishes, package scrapes stable publications landing page.

title: UK ETS free allocations — co2_ukets_allocations

title: UK ETS free allocations — co2_ukets_allocations
text: sector Character. "installations" (default) stationary installations, "aviation" aviation allocations. refresh Re-download? Default FALSE.

carbondata 0.1.1
text: CRAN policy compliance pass. functional API changes. Converted 14 17 \dontrun{} roxygen examples \donttest{}. examples wrap public, unauthenticated data fetches ‘UK ETS’, ‘RGGI’, California Cap--Trade, ‘ICAP’, World Bank, ‘RFF’, Berkeley VROD, ‘CarbonPlan OffsetsDB’. converted example now also sets options(carbondata.cache_dir = tempdir()) around call restores prior value afterwards, running example CRAN write user’s home filespace. co2_offsets_db() example now guards arrow::read_parquet() call requireNamespace("arrow", quietly = TRUE) example error arrow (Suggests) installed. co2_euets_emissions() co2_euets_allocations(): DG CLIMA wide-format file schema drifted 2026, functions currently abort. Marked \dontrun{} comment pending parser update. co2_cad_trust(): placeholder always aborts (CAD Trust unauthenticated public API).

title: carbondata 0.1.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-04-21 Initial CRAN release.

title: carbondata 0.1.0
text: co2_euets_emissions() fetches verified greenhouse-gas emissions installation year European Environment Agency. co2_euets_allocations() fetches free allowance allocations. co2_euets_surrendered() fetches surrendered units per installation per year. co2_euets_price() fetches EUA auction settlement prices EEX public reports. co2_euets_installations() returns EU ETS installation registry.

title: carbondata 0.1.0
text: co2_ukets() fetches UK ETS prices, verified emissions, allocations. co2_rggi() fetches RGGI auction prices, quarterly emissions, allowance distribution COATS system. co2_california() fetches California Cap--Trade auction settlement prices, emissions, auction volumes.

title: carbondata 0.1.0
text: co2_icap_prices() fetches ICAP Allowance Price Explorer dataset covering 20+ ETS jurisdictions globally. co2_world_bank() fetches World Bank Carbon Pricing Dashboard (carbon taxes + ETS, 70+ initiatives). co2_rff_pricing() fetches RFF World Carbon Pricing Database (Dolphin, Pollitt, Newbery 2020).

title: carbondata 0.1.0
text: co2_vrod() fetches Berkeley Voluntary Registry Offsets Database aggregating Verra, Gold Standard, ACR, CAR, ART TREES. co2_offsets_db() queries CarbonPlan OffsetsDB REST API. co2_cad_trust() queries Climate Action Data Trust (CAD Trust) API Article 6-aligned carbon credit metadata.

title: carbondata 0.1.0
text: co2_markets() lists supported markets coverage metadata. co2_clear_cache() empties local download cache. co2_cache_info() reports cached much space uses.

title: carbondata 0.1.0
text: New Zealand ETS, Korea ETS, China national pilot ETS Direct Verra / Gold Standard / Puro.earth registry scraping Rating provider integrations (Sylvera, BeZero, MSCI) Intraday carbon prices
